name: Kofi Amankwah

statedReqs.notes: Nurse, night shifts. Wants quiet and a short drive to Mercy General.

hiddenPrefs.desc: Sleeps days — noise topics (bells, taprooms, barky dogs) are dealbreakers he's too polite to enforce until it's too late.
Saving a second down payment to bring his mother over — a legal in-law option or 2nd unit potential is quietly worth everything.

intro: Kind, exhausted, decisive when it counts. Will trust your word exactly once. Make it count.
